mapper.insert: insert into comment(content, pic, score, reply, time, goods_id, shopkeeper_id, user_id, order_no) values (#{content}, #{pic}, #{score}, #{reply}, #{time}, #{goodsId}, #{shopkeeperId}, #{userId}, #{orderNo})
mapper.update:
update comment
content = #{content},
pic = #{pic},
score = #{score},
reply = #{reply},
time = #{time},
goods_id = #{goodsId},
shopkeeper_id = #{shopkeeperId},
user_id = #{userId},
order_no = #{orderNo},
where id = #{id}
